title: Sivrak family
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Sivrak family''' consisted of [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] [[Scout/Legends|scout]] [[Lak Sivrak/Legends|Lak Sivrak]], [[Gender/Legends|his]] brother [[Tagg Sivrak|Tagg]], his brother's [[Marriage/Legends|wife]] [[Nira Sivrak|Nira]], and their son, who was a student at the [[University of Coruscant/Legends|University of Coruscant]].
